references.name: NestWatch — Features of a Good Birdhouse

primary.name: Baltic-birch plywood, 6 mm, exterior phenolic glue (WBP)

alternate.name: Solid cedar, 1/4 in, three-ply lamination
alternate.laser_score: good with active air assist; resin flare risk
alternate.rationale: Trades faster build for better thermal mass and longer outdoor life. Drives different joinery (lap joints + screws instead of box joints) and a 7-day cure. Use when bird welfare is the lead criterion and the shop has cedar policy + active air assist.

design_table_overrides.joinery_strategy: lap joints + screws (box joints in 19 mm laminated stack are impractical)
design_table_overrides.joinery_door: small exterior brass hinges + latch (vs pivot+latch screw for the default Baltic-birch build)

design_choices_mm.roof_slope_direction: front-high → back-low (runoff sheds AWAY from entrance)

_derivation_notes: front_panel_h = interior_height + 2 * panel_thickness + roof_rise where roof_rise = round(box_exterior * tan(15°)) = 33; so 230 + 12 + 33 = 275
side_front_edge = front_panel_h - panel_thickness = 269 (sides sit between front+back; the roof caps the assembly)
floor_top_above_panel_bottom = 6 (dado) + 6 (floor thickness) = 12; entrance center then sits at panel-y = 12 + 175 = 187

joinery.floor_seating: 6 mm dado 6 mm above panel bottom; laser-only substitute = 4 triangular stop tabs
joinery.cleanout_door: right side panel pivots on 2 × #6 × 1/2 in screws + 1 latch screw

mounting.preferred_method: metal pole + stovepipe predator baffle (≥ 18 in baffle below box)
mounting.tree_mount_caveat: only with trunk baffle; predation rate substantially higher
mounting.entrance_orientation: facing away from prevailing storm wind (typically NE in continental US)

validation_targets_post_assembly.drainage_test: 250 mL water through entrance drains in ≤ 60 s
validation_targets_post_assembly.smoke_test: incense smoke at entrance draws upward and exits vent slots

welfare_gates.drainage: REQUIRED — ≥ 4 drains, total ≥ 2 cm² open area
welfare_gates.ventilation: REQUIRED — ≥ 6 cm² per side under roof line
welfare_gates.fledgling_grip: REQUIRED — score lines, kerf grooves, or roughened texture below entrance
welfare_gates.predator_baffle: REQUIRED on pole mounts; recommended on tree mounts
welfare_gates.cleanout_access: REQUIRED — hand-tool removable side, floor, or roof
